primary-hover.$description: The primary brand color on hover.

bg.$description: Background color for the (main) user interface.

fg.$description: Blackish/gray-dark foreground color for the (main) user interface.

fg-lighter.$description: Blackish 90% gray foreground color for lighter text elements (eg date).

fg-muted.$description: Font/foreground color for non-actionable or less-important content.

fg-heading.$description: Black foreground color for fully black elements, like headings.

fg-font-primary.$description: White font color for texts inside primary buttons.

fg-font-secondary.$description: White font color for texts inside secondary buttons.

fg-font-accent.$description: Dark gray font color for texts inside areas with a very light accent color as a light background-color.

gray-lightest.$description: Very lightest gray for hover styles.

red-notification.$description: The bright red color for notification badges and texts.

background.$description: The light blue background color for informational states and/or messages.

text.$description: The dark blue text color for informational states and/or messages.

background.$description: The light green background color for success states and/or messages.

text.$description: The dark green text color for success states and/or messages.

background.$description: The light orange background color for warning states and/or messages.

text.$description: The dark orange text color for warning states and/or messages.

background.$description: The light red background color for error/critical states and/or messages.

text.$description: The dark red text color for error/critical states and/or messages.

light.$description: The light red background color for error/critical states and/or messages.
